candidates.name: Cold Email Template Tester
candidates.pitch: Renders email templates in iframe sandboxes simulating each client. Offers spam score proxy via regex heuristics. Quota-based: 10 free previews/month.
candidates.pain: Outreach teams can't preview how their emails render across Gmail, Outlook, and Apple Mail before sending.

candidates.name: SLA Pulse Monitor
candidates.pitch: Injects live timers into Zendesk/Intercom/HubSpot ticket views. Built with MutationObserver to track ticket state changes. Per-seat SaaS bridges to existing helpdesk APIs.
candidates.pain: Support reps miss SLA deadlines because they lack real-time countdown visibility on tickets.

candidates.name: Sales Deck Version Auditor
candidates.pitch: Watches Google Slides/Canva decks for version changes, pushes Slack/email alerts when decks update. Auto-renames files with version stamps. Freemium for solo reps.
candidates.pain: Sales reps accidentally send outdated decks to prospects, damaging credibility in deals.

candidates.name: Gmail Thread Unsubscriber
candidates.pitch: Adds one-click unsubscribe buttons to Gmail threads using list-unsubscribe headers. Shows bulk unsubscribe dashboard. Bridges to SendGrid/Mailchimp for power users.
candidates.pain: Managing email unsubscriptions requires clicking through multiple pages and confirming in email clients.

candidates.name: Dependency Diff Viewer
candidates.pitch: Parses package-lock changes, fetches changelogs, shows semantic diff summary inline on GitHub PRs. Builds in 2-3 weeks with simple API calls to npm registry.
candidates.pain: Code reviewers waste time hunting changelogs to understand what an npm/yarn update actually modifies.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Figma CSS Snippet Fetcher
candidates.pitch: Uses Figma's plugin API to extract styles from selected frames, outputs Tailwind/CSS/React Native. Freemium with export limits, then per-seat unlock.
candidates.pain: Frontend devs manually translate Figma styles to CSS, losing time on repetitive styling work.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Confluence Staleness Detector
candidates.pitch: Overlays green/yellow/red freshness indicators on Confluence pages based on last-edit age and Jira ticket links. Uses Confluence REST API, ship in under a week.
candidates.pain: Engineers waste hours following outdated runbooks because docs don't show when they were last updated.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
